summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Staff Configuration and Reporting pages. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified working correctly including 6 configuration sections, KPI cards, period navigation, employee table with totals, and real functional PDF/Excel exports.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/config/departments returns list (200)
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{id}/config/departments creates department (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/hotels/{id}/config/departments/{id} removes department (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/config/shifts returns list (200)
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{id}/config/shifts creates shift (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/hotels/{id}/config/shifts/{id} removes shift (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/config/contract-templates returns list (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/config/roles returns list with permissions (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/config/hr-documents returns list (200)
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{id}/config/hr-documents creates document type (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/hotels/{id}/config/hr-documents/{id} removes document (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/config/settings returns settings object (200)
Backend: PUT /api/hotels/{id}/config/settings updates settings (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/reporting/staff-analytics returns analytics data (200)
Backend: GET /api/hotels/{id}/reporting/staff-analytics for previous month (200)
Frontend: /staff/configuration route loads correctly
Frontend: Configuration sidebar displays all 6 sections (Services & Postes, Horaires & Shifts, Contrats (Modeles), Utilisateurs & Roles, Documents RH, Parametres Staff)
Frontend: Services & Postes displays 6 department cards from API
Frontend: Can add new department via form (TEST_Spa created successfully)
Frontend: Horaires & Shifts displays 4 shift templates in table
Frontend: Shift table shows code, start/end times, duration, majoration, color
Frontend: Utilisateurs & Roles shows permission matrix with 6 roles and 8 permissions
Frontend: Parametres Staff has 5 toggle switches (notifications, auto-reporting, DocuSign, payroll export, CP early use)
Frontend: Parametres Staff has logo upload, reporting emails, CP rollover date settings
Frontend: /staff/reporting route loads correctly
Frontend: Reporting displays 4 KPI cards (Collaborateurs actifs, Heures totales, Heures supplementaires, Arrets maladie)
Frontend: Period selector shows month/year with navigation arrows
Frontend: Period navigation works (Mars 2026 -> Fevrier 2026 -> Avril 2026)
Frontend: Employee details table with 8 columns (COLLABORATEUR, SERVICE, J. TRAV., H. TOTALES, H. SUP, ABS., CP, MALADIE)
Frontend: TOTAUX row present in table footer
Frontend: Heures par service chart section present
Frontend: PDF export button opens print dialog (shows 'Rapport PDF genere' toast)
Frontend: Excel export downloads CSV file (rapport_staff_2026_4.csv)
Frontend: CSV file properly formatted with headers and totals row
Frontend: Auto-report toggle with Inactif/Actif status and Configurer button
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Spa department during testing (auto-cleaned by soft delete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Configuration page has 6 sections accessible via sidebar buttons. Reporting page has real functional exports - PDF uses window.print() and Excel generates CSV download. All config endpoints auto-create default data if none exists. Hotel ID for testing: 4f02769a-5f63-4121-bb97-a7061563d934

sections: Services & Postes - Department cards with positions, add/delete functionality
Horaires & Shifts - Shift templates table with CRUD operations
Contrats (Modeles) - Contract templates with status toggle
Utilisateurs & Roles - Permission matrix with 6 roles x 8 permissions
Documents RH - HR document types with mandatory/OCR flags
Parametres Staff - Logo, emails, toggles, CP settings

exports.pdf: Real functional - opens print dialog via window.print()
